title: Birthday Candles for Cakes 0-9 Number Candles Blue Birthday Cake Candles for Anniversary Birthday Party Decorations Cake Toppers Number 0 Cake Candles
features: HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL - These birthday candles are made of high quality wax material and PP plastic candle holder. Odorless, smokeless and non-toxic, safe to use and easy to insert into the cake.
SPARKLING SURFACE - The 3D numeral birthday candles are attractive and shiny. The metallic glittering candles will provide an elegant effect and romantic atmosphere to your party.

SIZE - Number birthday candle measures about 7 cm / 2.7 inches in length, and the total length (Excluding the candle pick) is approx. 13.5 cm / 5.3 inches, a suitable size can be used as a cake topper decoration for most birthday and wedding cakes.

6 COLORS & WIDE USAGE - We have 6 metallic colors, Gold, Silver, Pink, Blue, Black and Rose gold for your choice. Ideal cake decoration for many occasions, such as birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, retirement, family reunions, weddings, even Christmas, essential items for party cakes, bring you unforgettable and meaningful parties.

QUALITY GUARANTY - Each birthday candle is safely packed in a separate box. Provide good protection and reduce damage during transportation. Please contact us immediately if there is any issue with your order. We promise 100% refund AT ANY TIME if you're not satisfied with this numeral candle.
